title: Stage 3 Output
description: Output artifact of Stage 3 (code generation). Records the generated file paths relative to the repository root. Stage 4 reads this artifact to locate files for build and test.

scorer_file.description: Path to the generated scorer file, relative to the repository root. Must be a snake_case .go file (not _test.go) in the scorer package directory.

test_file.description: Path to the generated test file, relative to the repository root. Must be a _test.go file in the scorer package directory.

register_file.description: Path to the register.go file where the plugin.Register() call was added.

scorer_type.description: The EvolvedScorerType constant value. Convention: lowercase-hyphenated, suffixed with '-scorer'.
